scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --filter "!@workspace/mockup-sandbox" --if-present run build
scripts.build:prod: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/drimpay run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
